Title: User registration with valid data
Test Data:
- username: testuser
- password: testpassword
- email: testuser@example.com
- admin: false
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the registration page
2. Enter the test user data
3. Click the "Register" button
Expected Result:
- The user is registered successfully
- The user is redirected to the login page
- The user's data is stored in the database

Title: User registration with invalid email format
Test Data:
- username: testuser
- password: testpassword
- email: testuser
- admin: false
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the registration page
2. Enter the invalid email format
3. Click the "Register" button
Expected Result:
- An error message is displayed
- The user is not registered
- The user's data is not stored in the database

Title: User login with valid data
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the login page
2. Enter the valid user data
3. Click the "Login" button
Expected Result:
- The user is logged in successfully
- The user is redirected to the dashboard

Title: User login with invalid data
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the login page
2. Enter the invalid user data
3. Click the "Login" button
Expected Result:
- An error message is displayed
- The user is not logged in

Title: User deletion with valid data
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the user profile page
2. Click the "Delete Account" button
3. Confirm the deletion
Expected Result:
- The user's account is deleted successfully
- The user is logged out
- The user's data is removed from the database

Title: User deletion with invalid data
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the user profile page
2. Enter the non-existent user's username
3. Click the "Delete Account" button
Expected Result:
- An error message is displayed
- The user's account is not deleted

Title: Adding a material with valid data
Test Data:
- name: Test Material
- description: This is a test material
- price: 10.00
- quantity: 10
- carbon footprint: 10.00
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the material management page
2. Enter the valid material data
3. Click the "Add Material" button
Expected Result:
- The material is added successfully
- The material is displayed in the material list

Title: Adding a material with invalid data
Test Data:
- name:
- description: This is a test material
- price: invalid-price
- quantity: invalid-quantity
- carbon footprint: invalid-carbon-footprint
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the material management page
2. Enter the invalid material data
3. Click the "Add Material" button
Expected Result:
- An error message is displayed
- The material is not added

Title: Updating a material with valid data
Test Data:
- name: Updated Test Material
- description: This is an updated test material
- price: 20.00
- quantity: 20
- carbon footprint: 20.00
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the material management page
2. Select the existing material
3. Enter the valid updated material data
4. Click the "Update Material" button
Expected Result:
- The material is updated successfully
- The updated material is displayed in the material list

Title: Updating a material with invalid data
Test Data:
- name:
- description: This is an updated test material
- price: invalid-price
- quantity: invalid-quantity
- carbon footprint: invalid-carbon-footprint
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the material management page
2. Select the existing material
3. Enter the invalid updated material data
4. Click the "Update Material" button
Expected Result:
- An error message is displayed
- The material is not updated

Title: Deleting a material with valid data
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the material management page
2. Select the existing material
3. Click the "Delete Material" button
4. Confirm the deletion
Expected Result:
- The material is deleted successfully
- The material is removed from the material list

Title: Deleting a non-existent material
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the material management page
2. Enter the non-existent material's name
3. Click the "Delete Material" button
Expected Result:
- An error message is displayed
- The material is not deleted

Title: User accessing own materials
Preconditions: User is registered and has materials
Test Data: - User's materials: Test Material 1, Test Material 2
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the user profile page
2. Click the "My Materials" tab
Expected Result: - The user's materials are displayed

Title: User accessing other users' materials (as admin)
Preconditions: User is an admin and another user has materials
Test Data:
- Admin user: testadmin
- Other user: testuser
- Other user's materials: Test Material 1, Test Material 2
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the user management page
2. Select the other user
3. Click the "View Materials" button
Expected Result: - The other user's materials are displayed

Title: User accessing other users' materials (not as admin)
Preconditions: User is not an admin and another user has materials
Test Data:
- User: testuser
- Other user: testadmin
- Other user's materials: Test Material 1, Test Material 2
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the user management page
2. Select the other user
3. Click the "View Materials" button
Expected Result:
- An error message is displayed
- The other user's materials are not displayed

Title: Device scan with functioning components
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the device scan page
2. Click the "Scan Device" button
Expected Result:
- The device scan is executed
- The impact of component replacement is calculated
- The name, impact component, and diagnostic device are returned

Title: Device scan with defective components
Preconditions: Device is connected and has defective components
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the device scan page
2. Click the "Scan Device" button
Expected Result:
- The device scan is executed
- The impact of component replacement is calculated
- The name, impact component, and diagnostic device are returned

Title: Device scan with no components
Preconditions: Device is connected but has no components
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the device scan page
2. Click the "Scan Device" button
Expected Result:
- An error message is displayed
- The impact of component replacement is not calculated
- No name, impact component, and diagnostic device are returned

Title: Device hardware scan with invalid data
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the device scan page
2. Click the "Scan Device" button
3. Modify the hardware scan data
Expected Result:
- An error message is displayed
- The impact of component replacement is not calculated
- No name, impact component, and diagnostic device are returned

Title: Application scans device hardware
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the device scan page
2. Click the "Scan Device" button
Expected Result:
- The device hardware scan is executed
- The impact of component replacement is calculated
- The name, impact component, and diagnostic device are returned

Title: Application calculates component life expectancy
Preconditions: Device hardware scan data is available
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the device scan page
2. Click the "Scan Device" button
Expected Result:
- The component life expectancy is calculated
- The result is returned

Title: Application returns device diagnostic information
Preconditions: Device hardware scan data is available
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the device scan page
2. Click the "Scan Device" button
Expected Result: - The diagnostic information for the device is returned

Title: Application returns component replacement impact
Preconditions: Device hardware scan data is available
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the device scan page
2. Click the "Scan Device" button
Expected Result: - The impact of component replacement is returned

Title: Application returns component name
Preconditions: Device hardware scan data is available
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the device scan page
2. Click the "Scan Device" button
Expected Result: - The name of the component is returned

Title: Application returns multiple components' information
Preconditions: Device hardware scan data for multiple components is available
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the device scan page
2. Click the "Scan Device" button
Expected Result: - The information for all components is returned

Title: Application returns error message for invalid data
